alt: Cluster of red and green liquidambar star-shaped leaves in daylight.
caption: Liquidambar.

alt: Frame-filling cluster of deep-red liquidambar leaves.
caption: Liquidambar, filling the frame.

alt: A single yellow leaf resting at the edge of a long crack in dark asphalt.
caption: One leaf, one crack.

alt: Purple-heart tradescantia ground cover with variegated plants behind.
caption: Purple heart, ground level.

alt: Purple-heart bed with a fresh flowering shoot rising through dark leaves.
caption: Purple heart, in flower.

alt: A yellow gingko branch lying flat on the surface of a swimming pool.
caption: Gingko on water.

alt: Wider composition of the same gingko branch floating on the pool surface.
caption: Gingko on water, wider.

alt: Purple-heart plants with small pink-violet flowers, weathered wood at the edge.
caption: Purple heart, flowers and wood.

alt: A bird-of-paradise plant against a peach stucco wall beside an arched window.
caption: Bird of paradise, stucco.

alt: A bronze sculpture of a flutist mid-stride on an Italianate building corner.
caption: Bronze flutist.

alt: Still life of three large conch and scallop shells in dark wooden bowls under side light.
caption: Shells in bowls.

alt: Still life of a single scallop shell next to a textured blue glass orb under hard side light.
caption: Scallop and glass orb.

alt: Sun-backlit autumn leaves at dusk with college apartments and a distant ridge.
caption: Late autumn on the UCSD campus.

alt: Close-up of a backlit maple leaf, rim-lit by the setting sun.
caption: Rim light through the canopy.

alt: Autumn branches with a eucalyptus grove and the sky going pink behind.
caption: Twilight under the eucalyptus.

alt: Muir College Apartments at dusk, vine-draped tree in foreground.
caption: Muir College, blue hour.

alt: Dense canopy of red and purple autumn leaves against a pale dusk sky.
caption: Color in the canopy.

alt: Bougainvillea-style red blooms in front of campus apartments at dusk.
caption: Bougainvillea before sundown.

alt: Autumn canopy lit from behind by a warm artificial light, leaves glowing where the lamp's beam hits them.
caption: Lit from behind.

alt: A single backlit leaf held up to a streetlight against a night sky.
caption: One leaf, one lamp.

alt: Empty downtown intersection at night, a residential tower beside a lit storefront.
caption: Downtown, late.

alt: Palm trees framing a neon Hotel St. James sign at night.
caption: Hotel St. James through the palms.

alt: Closer view of the Hotel St. James sign with uplit palm trees and a traffic light.
caption: Hotel St. James, uplit.

alt: A historic downtown facade washed in red and green festive lighting.
caption: Holiday wash on the facade.

alt: An American flag and a California state flag flying on a building at night.
caption: Two flags after dark.

alt: Long exposure of the Broadway Fountain at Horton Plaza Park, red-lit dome and arcing water.
caption: Horton Plaza Fountain, long exposure.

alt: The Broadway Fountain from a different angle, water spouts and red illumination at night.
caption: Horton Plaza Fountain, second take.

alt: Tight detail on the red-lit dome of the Broadway Fountain at Horton Plaza.
caption: The dome, up close.

alt: An empty downtown corner at night with an AT&T store front-lit beneath a residential tower.
caption: An AT&T at midnight.

alt: A wide sculptural tree silhouetted against an illuminated colonnade at night, a lone figure passing beneath.
caption: The tree on the corner.

alt: Sunset over a desert playa with distant silhouettes of walkers and low ground fog.
caption: Playa, the walk back.

alt: A sound stage with PA towers and tents on the open desert at golden hour.
caption: Stage in the dust.

alt: A single silhouetted figure on the playa at sunset with arm raised.
caption: Alone on the playa.

alt: Tilt-shift-style blurred sunrise / sunset over a distant ridge.
caption: Ridge, soft.

alt: Brandon raising his DSLR to his face, silhouetted against a pastel dusk sky.
caption: Brandon, mid-shot.

alt: Sound stage with parked cars on the dunes under a pink-orange sunset.
caption: Stage, pink sky.

alt: Camp and sound stage clustered against distant mountains at deep sunset.
caption: Camp against the range.

alt: A couple posing at sunset, one holding a camera, one with arms wide.
caption: Sunset portrait.

alt: Same couple, more energetic pose, jumping against the dusk sky.
caption: Sunset portrait, take two.

alt: Three women hugging from behind, watching the sunset over the playa.
caption: Three friends, last light.

alt: A blue BMW sedan parked on a dry desert lakebed with mountains behind and a distant camp on the horizon.
caption: Out at the lakebed.

alt: Black-and-white shot of two outdoor BBQ grills flanking a tiled center counter, slatted benches in front.
caption: Off the patio.

alt: Lush garden bed of red bromeliad flowers, palm fronds, and asparagus ferns against pale yellow architecture.
caption: Bromeliad garden.

alt: Close-up of a deep-red ginger flower spike against bold green tropical leaves.
caption: Red ginger.

alt: A eucalyptus tree at sunset, its canopy wrapped in warm low side-light against a dusky lawn.
caption: Eucalyptus at golden hour.

alt: Red maple foliage layered in front of a row of pale concrete columns, autumn light filtering through.
caption: Red against columns.

alt: Bold yellow UCSD letters on a campus sign, repeated across the frame with figures walking past in soft motion blur.
caption: UCSD, UCSD, UCSD.

alt: Empty UCSD RIMAC gymnasium with a single figure dribbling far across the polished hardwood under stadium lights.
caption: Solo on the court.

alt: Downtown San Diego skyline at night, lit office towers and the silhouettes of palm trees against a deep navy sky.
caption: San Diego after dark.

alt: A grand Victorian hotel facade outlined entirely in warm Christmas lights, glowing against the night.
caption: Lit up for the season.

alt: Black-and-white view of a downtown street at night, headlights streaking between rows of parked cars and lit storefronts.
caption: Headlights in the city.
